properties.sql:
select
    '../docs/tiktok' as tiktok_root,
    '../docs/tiktok/.env.tiktok' as env_file,
    '.stitchly/secrets/tiktok' as out_dir,
    '.stitchly/secrets/tiktok/tiktok_tokens.json' as token_file,
    'artifacts/tiktok/auth_bootstrap/data.parquet' as artifact_path,
    180 as wait_timeout_seconds;

properties.code:
set -eu

workspace="${DUCKLE_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}"
duckdb_bin="${DUCKLE_DUCKDB_BIN:-duckdb}"

csv_value() {
  tail -n +2 | tr -d '\r' | sed 's/^"//; s/"$//'
}

input_value() {
  col="$1"
  "$duckdb_bin" -csv "$DUCKLE_DUCKDB_DATABASE" -c "select coalesce(cast(\"${col}\" as varchar), '') from \"$DUCKLE_INPUT_TABLE\" limit 1" | csv_value
}

json_escape() {
  sed 's/\\/\\\\/g; s/"/\\"/g'
}

cd "$workspace"

tiktok_root="$(input_value tiktok_root)"
env_file="$(input_value env_file)"
out_dir="$(input_value out_dir)"
token_file="$(input_value token_file)"
wait_timeout_seconds="$(input_value wait_timeout_seconds)"

mkdir -p "$out_dir"

export TIKTOK_ENV_FILE="$env_file"
export TIKTOK_OUT_DIR="$out_dir"
export TIKTOK_TOKEN_FILE="$token_file"
export TIKTOK_OPEN_BROWSER="false"
if [ -n "$wait_timeout_seconds" ]; then
  export TIKTOK_CODE_POLL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="$wait_timeout_seconds"
fi

wrapper_stdout="$out_dir/auth_make_url.wrapper.stdout.txt"
wrapper_stderr="$out_dir/auth_make_url.wrapper.stderr.txt"
make_url_exit_code=0

if bash "$tiktok_root/tiktok_make_auth_url.sh" > "$wrapper_stdout" 2> "$wrapper_stderr"; then
  make_url_exit_code=0
else
  make_url_exit_code=$?
fi

auth_url=""
state=""
if [ -s "$out_dir/oauth_authorize_url.txt" ]; then
  auth_url="$(tr -d '\r\n' < "$out_dir/oauth_authorize_url.txt")"
fi
if [ -s "$out_dir/oauth_state.txt" ]; then
  state="$(tr -d '\r\n' < "$out_dir/oauth_state.txt")"
fi

auth_url_json="$(printf '%s' "$auth_url" | json_escape)"
state_json="$(printf '%s' "$state" | json_escape)"
tiktok_root_json="$(printf '%s' "$tiktok_root" | json_escape)"
env_file_json="$(printf '%s' "$env_file" | json_escape)"
out_dir_json="$(printf '%s' "$out_dir" | json_escape)"
token_file_json="$(printf '%s' "$token_file" | json_escape)"
wrapper_stdout_json="$(printf '%s' "$wrapper_stdout" | json_escape)"
wrapper_stderr_json="$(printf '%s' "$wrapper_stderr" | json_escape)"

printf '{"ok":%s,"make_url_exit_code":%s,"auth_url":"%s","state":"%s","tiktok_root":"%s","env_file":"%s","out_dir":"%s","token_file":"%s","wait_timeout_seconds":%s,"wrapper_stdout_file":"%s","wrapper_stderr_file":"%s"}\n' \
  "$([ "$make_url_exit_code" -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$auth_url" ] && printf true || printf false)" \
  "$make_url_exit_code" \
  "$auth_url_json" \
  "$state_json" \
  "$tiktok_root_json" \
  "$env_file_json" \
  "$out_dir_json" \
  "$token_file_json" \
  "${wait_timeout_seconds:-0}" \
  "$wrapper_stdout_json" \
  "$wrapper_stderr_json"

exit 0

set -eu

workspace="${DUCKLE_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}"
duckdb_bin="${DUCKLE_DUCKDB_BIN:-duckdb}"

csv_value() {
  tail -n +2 | tr -d '\r' | sed 's/^"//; s/"$//'
}

input_json_value() {
  field="$1"
  "$duckdb_bin" -csv "$DUCKLE_DUCKDB_DATABASE" -c "select coalesce(json_extract_string(try_cast(stdout as json), '$.${field}'), '') from \"$DUCKLE_INPUT_TABLE\" limit 1" | csv_value
}

cd "$workspace"

tiktok_root="$(input_json_value tiktok_root)"
env_file="$(input_json_value env_file)"
out_dir="$(input_json_value out_dir)"
token_file="$(input_json_value token_file)"
state="$(input_json_value state)"
wait_timeout_seconds="$(input_json_value wait_timeout_seconds)"
make_url_ok="$(input_json_value ok)"

if [ "$make_url_ok" != "true" ]; then
  echo "wait_and_exchange_auth: auth URL generation did not succeed" >&2
  exit 1
fi

export TIKTOK_ENV_FILE="$env_file"
export TIKTOK_OUT_DIR="$out_dir"
export TIKTOK_TOKEN_FILE="$token_file"
if [ -n "$wait_timeout_seconds" ] && [ "$wait_timeout_seconds" != "0" ]; then
  export TIKTOK_CODE_POLL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="$wait_timeout_seconds"
fi

wrapper_stdout="$out_dir/auth_wait_exchange.wrapper.stdout.txt"
wrapper_stderr="$out_dir/auth_wait_exchange.wrapper.stderr.txt"
auth_status_file="$out_dir/auth_bootstrap_status.json"
empty_auth_status_file="$out_dir/auth_bootstrap_status.empty.json"
bootstrap_exit_code=0

if bash "$tiktok_root/tiktok_wait_for_code.sh" "$state" > "$wrapper_stdout" 2> "$wrapper_stderr"; then
  code="$(tr -d '\r\n' < "$out_dir/oauth_callback_code.txt")"
  if bash "$tiktok_root/tiktok_exchange_code.sh" "$code" >> "$wrapper_stdout" 2>> "$wrapper_stderr"; then
    bootstrap_exit_code=0
  else
    bootstrap_exit_code=$?
  fi
else
  bootstrap_exit_code=$?
fi

if [ -s "$token_file" ]; then
  if bash "$tiktok_root/tiktok_auth_status.sh" > "$auth_status_file" 2>> "$wrapper_stderr"; then
    :
  else
    printf '{}\n' > "$auth_status_file"
  fi
else
  printf '{}\n' > "$auth_status_file"
fi

if [ ! -s "$auth_status_file" ]; then
  printf '{}\n' > "$empty_auth_status_file"
  auth_status_file="$empty_auth_status_file"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  has_token="false"
  if [ -s "$token_file" ] && jq -e '.access_token' "$token_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    has_token="true"
  fi

  jq -n \
    --argjson bootstrap_exit_code "$bootstrap_exit_code" \
    --argjson has_token "$has_token" \
    --arg token_file "$token_file" \
    --arg out_dir "$out_dir" \
    --arg auth_status_file "$auth_status_file" \
    --arg wrapper_stdout_file "$wrapper_stdout" \
    --arg wrapper_stderr_file "$wrapper_stderr" \
    --rawfile wrapper_stdout "$wrapper_stdout" \
    --rawfile wrapper_stderr "$wrapper_stderr" \
    --slurpfile auth_status "$auth_status_file" \
    '{
      ok: (($bootstrap_exit_code == 0) and $has_token),
      bootstrap_exit_code: $bootstrap_exit_code,
      token_file: $token_file,
      out_dir: $out_dir,
      auth_status_file: $auth_status_file,
      wrapper_stdout_file: $wrapper_stdout_file,
      wrapper_stderr_file: $wrapper_stderr_file,
      auth_status: ($auth_status[0] // {}),
      stdout_preview: ($wrapper_stdout | split("\n") | map(select(length > 0)) | .[0:12] | join("\n")),
      stderr_preview: ($wrapper_stderr | split("\n") | map(select(length > 0)) | .[0:12] | join("\n"))
    }'
else
  printf '{"ok":false,"bootstrap_exit_code":%s,"token_file":"%s","out_dir":"%s","error":"jq not found","wrapper_stdout_file":"%s","wrapper_stderr_file":"%s"}\n' \
    "$bootstrap_exit_code" \
    "$token_file" \
    "$out_dir" \
    "$wrapper_stdout" \
    "$wrapper_stderr"
fi

exit 0

sampleRows.stdout:
{
  "ok": false,
  "bootstrap_exit_code": 1,
  "token_file": ".stitchly/secrets/tiktok/tiktok_tokens.json",
  "out_dir": ".stitchly/secrets/tiktok",
  "auth_status_file": ".stitchly/secrets/tiktok/auth_bootstrap_status.json",
  "wrapper_stdout_file": ".stitchly/secrets/tiktok/auth_wait_exchange.wrapper.stdout.txt",
  "wrapper_stderr_file": ".stitchly/secrets/tiktok/auth_wait_exchange.wrapper.stderr.txt",
  "auth_status": {
    "token_file": ".stitchly/secrets/tiktok/tiktok_tokens.json",
    "has_access_token": true,
    "has_refresh_token": true,
    "open_id_present": true,
    "scope": "user.info.basic,video.list",
    "saved_at_epoch": 1782336057,
    "access_token_expires_at_epoch": 1782422457,
    "refresh_token_expires_at_epoch": 1813872057,

  },

properties.sql:
, raw as (
    select
      trim(coalesce(stdout, '')) as stdout_json,
      coalesce(stderr, '') as shell_stderr,
      try_cast(exit_code as integer) as shell_exit_code,
      try_cast(duration_ms as bigint) as shell_duration_ms
    from input
  ),
  parsed as (
    select
      *,
      try_cast(nullif(stdout_json, '') as json) as payload
    from raw
  )
  select
    current_timestamp as checked_at,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.ok') as boolean), false) as auth_bootstrap_ok,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.bootstrap_exit_code') as integer), -1) as bootstrap_exit_code,
    shell_exit_code,
    shell_duration_ms,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.token_file') as token_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.out_dir') as out_dir,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status_file') as auth_status_file,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.access_token_seconds_remaining') as bigint) as access_token_seconds_remaining,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.refresh_token_seconds_remaining') as bigint) as refresh_token_seconds_remaining,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.has_access_token') as boolean), false) as has_access_token,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.has_refresh_token') as boolean), false) as has_refresh_token,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.open_id_present') as boolean), false) as open_id_present,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.wrapper_stdout_file') as wrapper_stdout_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.wrapper_stderr_file') as wrapper_stderr_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.stdout_preview') as stdout_preview,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.stderr_preview') as stderr_preview,
    payload is not null as parsed_ok,
    case
      when payload is null then 'parse_failed'
      when coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.ok') as boolean), false) then 'ok'
      else 'auth_bootstrap_failed'
    end as auth_bootstrap_status,
    stdout_json as raw_stdout,
    shell_stderr as raw_stderr
  from parsed

properties.code:
set -eu

duckdb_bin="${DUCKLE_DUCKDB_BIN:-duckdb}"

csv_value() {
  tail -n +2 | tr -d '\r' | sed 's/^"//; s/"$//'
}

input_value() {
  col="$1"
  "$duckdb_bin" -csv "$DUCKLE_DUCKDB_DATABASE" -c "select coalesce(cast(\"${col}\" as varchar), '') from \"$DUCKLE_INPUT_TABLE\" limit 1" | csv_value
}

status="$(input_value auth_bootstrap_status)"
ok="$(input_value auth_bootstrap_ok)"
exit_code="$(input_value bootstrap_exit_code)"
token_file="$(input_value token_file)"
access_remaining="$(input_value access_token_seconds_remaining)"
refresh_remaining="$(input_value refresh_token_seconds_remaining)"
stdout_preview="$(input_value stdout_preview)"
stderr_preview="$(input_value stderr_preview)"

if [ "$ok" = "true" ]; then
  printf 'TikTok auth bootstrap OK: token_file=%s access_token_seconds_remaining=%s refresh_token_seconds_remaining=%s\n' \
    "$token_file" \
    "${access_remaining:-unknown}" \
    "${refresh_remaining:-unknown}"
else
  printf 'TikTok auth bootstrap FAILED: status=%s exit_code=%s token_file=%s\n' \
    "${status:-unknown}" \
    "${exit_code:-unknown}" \
    "$token_file"
  if [ -n "$stdout_preview" ]; then
    printf 'stdout_preview:\n%s\n' "$stdout_preview"
  fi
  if [ -n "$stderr_preview" ]; then
    printf 'stderr_preview:\n%s\n' "$stderr_preview"
  fi
fi

exit 0

sampleRows.stdout:

stdout_preview:
Waiting for OAuth code for state: a4deb50b60ef7bcaed8af6d7228a4b09
Polling: https://threadback.vercel.app/api/code
stderr_preview:
timed out waiting for OAuth code after 180s
